apis.name: JWT Decode (unsafe)
apis.description: Decode JWT header and payload without signature verification. For inspection only.

apis.name: Base64 Encode
apis.description: Encode text to Base64 string.

apis.name: Base64 Decode
apis.description: Decode Base64 string to UTF-8 text.

apis.name: URL Encode
apis.description: Percent-encode a string for safe URL inclusion.

apis.name: URL Decode
apis.description: Decode a percent-encoded URL string.

apis.name: HTML Escape
apis.description: Escape HTML special characters (&, <, >, ") to HTML entities.

apis.name: Readability Score
apis.description: Flesch-Kincaid grade level, word/sentence/syllable counts, and reading time estimate.

apis.name: Simple Sentiment
apis.description: Rule-based positive/negative sentiment scoring without LLM. Fast and deterministic.

apis.name: Keyword Frequency
apis.description: Extract top keywords by frequency from text, excluding common stop words.

apis.name: Language Detect
apis.description: Detect English, Spanish, French, or German by word frequency heuristics.

apis.name: URL Parts
apis.description: Parse a URL into protocol, host, pathname, query params, and hash.

apis.name: JSON Path Explorer
apis.description: Enumerate all dot-notation paths in a JSON object with type and value.

apis.name: Duplicate Detector
apis.description: Find duplicate values in an array, return indices and counts.

apis.name: Outlier Detection
apis.description: Find statistical outliers in a number array using z-score threshold.

apis.name: Value Frequency
apis.description: Count frequency of each value in an array, sorted by most common.

apis.name: String Similarity
apis.description: Compare two strings character-by-character and return a 0-1 similarity score.

apis.name: Email Parts
apis.description: Parse an email address into local part, domain, and TLD.

apis.name: IP Type
apis.description: Classify an IP as private/public/loopback, detect version (v4/v6), and class (A/B/C).

apis.name: Cron Parser
apis.description: Parse a cron expression into named fields with a human-readable description.

apis.name: Password Strength
apis.description: Score password strength 0-6 based on length, case, digits, and symbols.

apis.name: Color Analyzer
apis.description: Analyze a hex color for RGB values, brightness, dark/light classification, and luminance.

apis.name: Extract JSON Blocks
apis.description: Extract and parse all JSON objects embedded in text. Returns parsed objects and count.

apis.name: Extract Code Blocks
apis.description: Extract fenced code blocks from Markdown text with language detection.

apis.name: Extract Markdown Tables
apis.description: Extract pipe-delimited Markdown tables from text into structured arrays.

apis.name: Extract Links
apis.description: Extract all unique HTTP/HTTPS URLs from text.

apis.name: Split Sentences
apis.description: Split text into individual sentences on .!? boundaries.

apis.name: Split Paragraphs
apis.description: Split text into paragraphs on blank line boundaries.

apis.name: Build Markdown Table
apis.description: Generate a Markdown table from a headers array and rows array of arrays.

apis.name: Format Currency
apis.description: Format a number as currency using Intl.NumberFormat with configurable locale and currency code.

apis.name: Format Number
apis.description: Format a number with locale-aware thousands separators and configurable decimal places.

apis.name: Format Date
apis.description: Format a date as short, long, or default style with ISO and Unix timestamp outputs.

apis.name: Format Bytes
apis.description: Convert a byte count to human-readable size (B, KB, MB, GB, TB).

apis.name: Format Duration
apis.description: Convert seconds to human-readable duration (e.g. 2h 3m 15s).

apis.name: Format Phone
apis.description: Format a 10-digit phone number as (XXX) XXX-XXXX.

apis.name: Logic: If/Else
apis.description: Return then_value if condition is truthy, else_value otherwise.

apis.name: Logic: Switch
apis.description: Map a value to a result using a cases object with optional default.

apis.name: Logic: Coalesce
apis.description: Return the first non-null, non-undefined, non-empty value from an array.

apis.name: Data Group By
apis.description: Data Group By — pure compute superpower for AI agents.

apis.name: Sort By
apis.description: Sort an array of objects by a key, ascending or descending.

apis.name: Unique / Dedupe
apis.description: Remove duplicate items from an array, optionally by a key field.

apis.name: Chunk Array
apis.description: Split an array into chunks of a specified size.

apis.name: Zip Arrays
apis.description: Interleave two or more arrays element-by-element into a single array of tuples.

apis.name: Transpose Matrix
apis.description: Transpose a 2D matrix (array of arrays) flipping rows and columns.

apis.name: Random Sample
apis.description: Draw a random sample of n items from an array without replacement.

apis.name: Paginate Array
apis.description: Slice an array into a page of results with total, total_pages, and has_next metadata.

apis.name: Array Lookup
apis.description: Find the first object in an array where key equals value.

apis.name: Data Aggregate
apis.description: Compute sum, avg, min, max, and count for a numeric field across an array of objects.

apis.name: Clean Slate
apis.description: Clear all context and return a fresh state. Useful for resetting between tasks.

apis.name: Anonymous Mailbox
apis.description: Leave a message at a named location for anonymous asynchronous pickup.

apis.name: Temporary Access Grant
apis.description: Grant temporary scoped access to a namespace with expiration.

apis.name: Meta API Generator
apis.description: Generate new API definitions from plain-text descriptions. Self-expanding platform.

apis.name: Flow State Induce

apis.description: Extract the deepest most illuminating metaphor from any situation.

apis.name: Foundation Assess
apis.description: Evaluate system foundations for stability and hidden cracks.

apis.name: Many Worlds
apis.description: Execute decisions in all variations simultaneously in separate branches.

apis.name: Self Referential Loop
apis.description: Create processes that operate on themselves with iteration tracking.

apis.name: Absence Detect
apis.description: Detect conspicuous absences — the dog that didnt bark.

apis.name: Fetch URL as Clean Text
apis.description: Fetch a URL and return clean readable text content, stripping all HTML tags, scripts, and styles. Returns the main textual content a human would read.

apis.name: Extract Links from URL
apis.description: Fetch a URL and extract all hyperlinks (href attributes), returning absolute URLs with their anchor text and whether they are internal or external.

apis.name: Get URL Metadata
apis.description: Fetch a URL and extract meta information: page title, meta description, Open Graph tags (og:title, og:image, og:description), Twitter card tags, and canonical URL.

apis.name: Detect Website Tech Stack
apis.description: Fetch a URL and detect technologies in use: JavaScript frameworks (React, Vue, Angular), CMS generators (WordPress, Ghost), analytics tools, CDNs, and server software from headers and HTML patterns.

apis.name: Measure URL Response Time
apis.description: Make multiple HTTP requests to a URL and return min, max, and average response times in milliseconds. Useful for detecting latency patterns and slowdowns.

apis.name: Fetch and Parse Sitemap
apis.description: Fetch a domain's sitemap.xml (or sitemap index), parse it, and return all listed URLs with their last-modified dates and change frequencies.

apis.name: Fetch and Parse robots.txt
apis.description: Fetch a domain's robots.txt, parse it, and return structured rules: which user-agents are allowed or disallowed which paths, crawl-delay directives, and sitemap references.

apis.name: Fetch and Parse RSS/Atom Feed
apis.description: Fetch a URL that contains an RSS or Atom feed, parse the XML, and return structured feed metadata (title, description, link) plus all items with titles, links, dates, and summaries.

apis.name: Get Latest RSS Items
apis.description: Fetch an RSS or Atom feed URL and return only the latest N items (default 10), sorted by publication date descending. Each item includes title, link, pubDate, and content summary.

apis.name: Basic Accessibility Check
apis.description: Fetch a URL and run basic accessibility checks: missing alt text on images, heading hierarchy issues, missing form labels, links without descriptive text, and color contrast warnings from inline styles.

apis.name: WHOIS Domain Lookup
apis.description: Perform a WHOIS lookup for a domain name and return parsed registration data: registrar, creation date, expiry date, name servers, registrant organization (when public), and status flags.

apis.name: IP Geolocation
apis.description: Resolve an IP address to its approximate geographic location using a built-in IP range database: country, region, city, latitude/longitude, and timezone. No external API key required.

apis.name: Current Time in Any Timezone
apis.description: Return the current accurate time in any IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York, Europe/Berlin). Returns ISO 8601 timestamp, human-readable format, UTC offset, and whether DST is active. Fixes the agent's unreliable internal clock.

apis.name: List All Timezones
apis.description: Return a complete list of all IANA timezones with their current UTC offsets, DST status, and representative city names. Useful for building timezone pickers or converting between zones.
